TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Pacidal Itiniay i Xincheng Cen no Hualien ko Pacidal a niyaro', 161 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 398 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 72% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 285 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 28% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 113 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 52%, śííŚ•áśčČťõÖśóŹ1%, Bunun 5%, Tayal 1%, Truku 9%, roma 3%.
S.PHON: pa ¶i…¨~…ģa…ĺ itiniaj i xin ¶ńß…ôŇč ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u pa ¶i…¨~…ģa…ĺ a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u amis **%, ******%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, taja…ĺ *%, tro~u~uko~u~u *%, ro~uma *%.
S.FORM: Pacidal Itiniay i Xincheng Cen no Hualien ko Pacidal a niyaro', 161 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 398 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 72% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 285 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 28% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 113 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 52%, śííŚ•áśčČťõÖśóŹ1%, Bunun 5%, Tayal 1%, Truku 9%, roma 3%.
